parents.subject: LU-19999 tcu: non-root user can access and restore Trash Can

commit.subject: LU-2006 tcu: keep FS flags unchanged after restore from Trash
commit.message:
LU-2006 tcu: keep FS flags unchanged after restore from Trash

FS flags of a file recovered from Trash Can should be kept
unchanged.

Add sanityn/test_118s.

Signed-off-by: Yingjin Qian <qian@ddn.com>
Change-Id: I6a3327eda0a04dfb5a3af6c44c100319eff0b4c9
